title: What the U.S. Blockade Means for Iran’s Economy
summary_full: Putting a stop to Iranian shipping will further add to Iran’s economic pain, analysts said, but it might not be enough to force concessions or lessen the global energy crunch.
summary_public: Putting a stop to Iranian shipping will further add to Iran’s economic pain, analysts said, but it might not be enough to force concessions or lessen the global energy crunch.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: What the U.S. Blockade Means for Iran’s Economy
